Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha Universit.official_note: Official IPU CET counselling portal (ipu.admissions.nic.in) cutoff page; publishes round-wise opening/closing rank PDFs by CET programme code. Better than the generic portal homepage.
Same official IPU counselling cutoff page; BHMCT is one of the CET programme codes whose round-wise cutoff PDFs are listed here.
Same official IPU counselling cutoff page; BJMC is one of the CET programme codes whose round-wise cutoff PDFs are listed here.

Himachal Pradesh Common Entrance Test.official_note: Official HPTU/HPCET counselling portal (.gov.in), linked from himtu.ac.in/en/admissions/hpcet. Replaces the wrong current URL (hptechboard.com is the HP Technical Education Board, a different body). Cutoffs are determined round-wise during counselling here. HPTU homepage: himtu.ac.in.

Indian Council of Agricultural Research.official_note: Official ICAR UG online counselling portal (maintained for ICAR, links to icar.org.in); has a 'Cut Off - 2025' section for CUET (ICAR-UG). Replaces icaradmission.in. Note: icarcounselling.com (double-l) is a dead/parked domain that redirects to a parking page.

Indian Institute of Art and Design Entra.official_note: Correct official IIAD admissions page for the iDAT entrance, but the fetcher is bot-blocked (HTTP 403); confirmed live via search. IIAD does not publish a numeric cutoff/closing-rank list - selection is portfolio/interview based, so no dedicated cutoff page exists.

Indian Institute of Foreign Trade Entran.official_note: Official IIFT MBA(IB) admissions hub (the old admissions.php now 404s). IIFT admits on CAT score; the official cutoff/shortlist criteria are in the Selection Criteria PDF linked here (e.g. iift.ac.in/iift/docs/LatestUpdates/Selection_Criteria_MBA_2026-28.pdf) - no traditional rank cutoff list.
